--- graph_table_qualified_graph.sql
SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE (schema.FinGraph FILTER WHERE TRUE RETURN 1 AS v) AS t

--- AST
&ast.QueryStatement{
  Query: &ast.Select{
    Results: []ast.SelectItem{
      &ast.Star{
        Star: 7,
      },
    },
    From: &ast.From{
      From:   9,
      Source: &ast.GraphTableExpr{
        GraphTable: 14,
        RParen:     74,
        GraphName:  &ast.Path{
          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 27,
              NameEnd: 33,
              Name:    "schema",
            },
            &ast.Ident{
              NamePos: 34,
              NameEnd: 42,
              Name:    "FinGraph",
            },
          },
        },
        Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
          Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
            &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
              Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
                &ast.GQLFilter{
                  Filter: 43,
                  Where:  50,
                  Expr:   &ast.BoolLiteral{
                    ValuePos: 56,
                    Value:    true,
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLReturn{
                  Return: 61,
                  Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
                    &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                      Star: -1,
                      Expr: &ast.IntLiteral{
                        ValuePos: 68,
                        ValueEnd: 69,
                        Base:     10,
                        Value:    "1",
                      },
                      Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                        As:    70,
                        Alias: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 73,
                          NameEnd: 74,
                          Name:    "v",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
        As: &ast.AsAlias{
          As:    76,
          Alias: &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 79,
            NameEnd: 80,
            Name:    "t",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
SELECT * FROM GRAPH_TABLE(schema.FinGraph FILTER WHERE TRUE RETURN 1 AS v) AS t
